title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Delhivery - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Delhivery - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Delhivery invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Delhivery:
Delhivery is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery!
